nasb.text: And Joshua and all Israel with him passed on from Lachish to Eglon, and they camped by it and fought against it.

esv.text: Then Joshua and all Israel with him passed on from Lachish to Eglon. And they laid siege to it and fought against it.

cnv.text: 約書亞和與他在一起的眾以色列人從拉吉往伊磯倫去，對著伊磯倫安營，攻打這城。

ccb.text: 约书亚又率领以色列全军从拉吉前往伊矶伦，在城外扎营，攻打伊矶伦。
